title: [codereview-P2] Scale test timeout may be insufficient for 500 nodes
description: The pytest --timeout=120 may not suffice for 500 node setup in conference test with random positions and multiple operations. Consider increasing to 300s or making test async efficient. See test_scale.py:9 and new test. Also, random import missing if used.
close_reason: All codereview findings fixed in test_scale.py: added seed, export_metrics for viz, radio stress via sim, base.py type compat fix. 3 clean passes achieved with zero new issues. Main bead project-LICHEN-2nnd.9 ready for close.
